title: Lana.exe
description: A horror mod that turns Lana from FPE into a bloodthirsty monster
body:
Lana.exe adds Lana from Fundamental Paper Education (FPE) into your Minecraft world, bringing a light horror element to normal gameplay.

Features
New Mob: Lana (FPE)
Spawns in your world with custom behavior
Custom Sounds
Includes footsteps, ambient noises, and other effects
Spawn Egg
You can summon Lana manually
Basic Events
Small effects like blindless

This mod adds a bit of suspense while still keeping the normal Minecraft experience. It’s simple to use and fits into regular survival gameplay.
